page_metadata.biotools__summary:
PyInteraph2 and PyInKnife2 to analyze networks in protein structural ensembles.

PyInKnife2 is a set of Python scripts to run an updated version of the PyInKnife pipeline [ for Protein Structure Network (PSN) analysis using PyInteraph2.
